strain.en: The heavy work put a strain on his back.
strain.zh: 粗重的工作讓他的背部承受壓力。

strand.en: A strand of hair fell across her face.
strand.zh: 一縷頭髮垂落在她臉上。

strap.en: The bag has a long shoulder strap.

strategic.en: They made a strategic plan to win.
strategic.zh: 他們擬定了取勝的策略性計畫。

striking.en: She has a striking red dress.
striking.zh: 她有一件醒目的紅色洋裝。

structural.en: The old bridge had structural problems.
structural.zh: 這座舊橋有結構上的問題。

stumble.en: He stumbled over a rock in the dark.
stumble.zh: 他在黑暗中被石頭絆倒。

sturdy.en: The chair is old but sturdy.
sturdy.zh: 這張椅子雖舊但很堅固。

submit.en: Please submit your report by Friday.
submit.zh: 請在星期五前繳交報告。

subsequent.en: The first plan failed, and subsequent ones too.
subsequent.zh: 第一個計畫失敗了，後續的也是。

subsidy.en: The farmers received a government subsidy.
subsidy.zh: 農民得到了政府的補助。

substantial.zh: 她做了一筆可觀的捐款。

substitute.en: You can use honey as a substitute for sugar.

subtle.en: There was a subtle change in her tone.
subtle.zh: 她的語氣有一絲微妙的變化。

suburban.en: They live in a quiet suburban area.
suburban.zh: 他們住在一個安靜的郊區。

successor.zh: 國王指定了他的繼承人。

suite.en: They booked a suite at the hotel.
suite.zh: 他們在飯店訂了一間套房。

superstition.en: Walking under a ladder is an old superstition.
superstition.zh: 從梯子下走過是個古老的迷信。

supervision.zh: 孩子在嚴密的看管下游泳。

supervisor.en: Ask your supervisor before you leave.

supposedly.en: He is supposedly the best player here.
supposedly.zh: 據說他是這裡最厲害的球員。

supreme.en: The case went to the supreme court.
supreme.zh: 這個案子上訴到最高法院。

surplus.en: The harvest gave us a surplus of food.
surplus.zh: 豐收讓我們有了多餘的食物。

surveillance.en: The store uses cameras for surveillance.
surveillance.zh: 這家店用攝影機進行監控。

suspend.en: The game was suspended due to rain.

sustain.en: Plants need water to sustain life.
sustain.zh: 植物需要水來維持生命。

swap.en: Let's swap seats so you can see better.
swap.zh: 我們換位子吧，這樣你看得比較清楚。

symbolic.en: The white dove is symbolic of peace.

symptom.en: A cough is a symptom of a cold.

syndrome.en: The doctor explained the rare syndrome.
syndrome.zh: 醫生解釋了這種罕見的症候群。

tackle.en: We need to tackle the problem together.
tackle.zh: 我們需要一起解決這個問題。

tactic.en: They changed their tactics to win.
tactic.zh: 他們改變戰術以求獲勝。

tangle.en: The kitten got into a tangle of yarn.
tangle.zh: 小貓被一團毛線纏住了。

tempt.en: The smell of bread tempted me.

temptation.en: She resisted the temptation to eat more.

terminal.en: We waited at the airport terminal.

terrify.en: The loud thunder terrified the child.
terrify.zh: 響亮的雷聲嚇壞了那個孩子。

testify.en: She will testify in court tomorrow.

texture.en: The cloth has a soft, smooth texture.
texture.zh: 這塊布有柔軟光滑的質感。

theft.en: He reported the theft of his bike.
theft.zh: 他報案說他的腳踏車被偷了。

theology.en: He studies theology at a college.
theology.zh: 他在一所學院研讀神學。

theoretical.en: It is only a theoretical idea for now.
theoretical.zh: 目前這只是個理論上的想法。

therapy.en: She had therapy after the injury.

thereby.en: She saved money, thereby reaching her goal.
thereby.zh: 她省下了錢，從而達成了目標。

thesis.en: He wrote a long thesis for his degree.
thesis.zh: 他為了學位寫了一篇長論文。

thigh.en: He hurt his thigh while running.

threshold.en: She paused at the threshold of the door.

thrill.en: The roller coaster gave us a thrill.
thrill.zh: 雲霄飛車帶給我們刺激感。

thriller.zh: 我們看了一部刺激的驚悚片。

thrive.en: Plants thrive in the warm sun.
thrive.zh: 植物在溫暖的陽光下茁壯成長。

throne.en: The young prince took the throne.

thrust.en: He thrust the key into the lock.

tick.en: Put a tick next to the right answer.

tile.en: The bathroom floor has white tiles.
tile.zh: 浴室的地板鋪著白色磁磚。

tin.en: She opened a tin of beans.

toll.en: We paid a toll to use the highway.
toll.zh: 我們付了過路費才能上高速公路。

torch.en: He lit a torch to see in the cave.
torch.zh: 他點起火把以便在洞穴裡看清楚。

torment.en: The mosquito bites tormented him all night.
torment.zh: 蚊子叮咬讓他整晚不得安寧。

traitor.en: He was called a traitor for betraying them.
traitor.zh: 他因背叛他們而被稱為叛徒。

transaction.zh: 銀行記錄了每一筆交易。

transformation.zh: 花園的改頭換面讓我們驚嘆。

transit.en: The goods were damaged in transit.
transit.zh: 貨物在運送途中受損了。

transition.en: The transition to a new school was smooth.
transition.zh: 轉換到新學校的過程很順利。

transmission.zh: 洗手能減少病毒的傳播。

transparent.en: The water was clear and transparent.

trauma.en: The accident left her with deep trauma.
trauma.zh: 這場意外給她留下了深深的創傷。

treaty.en: The two nations signed a peace treaty.
treaty.zh: 這兩個國家簽署了和平條約。

tribute.en: The song was a tribute to her hero.
tribute.zh: 這首歌是對她心目中英雄的致敬。

trigger.zh: 灰塵可能引發他的過敏。

trim.en: He trimmed the bushes in the garden.
trim.zh: 他修剪了花園裡的灌木。

trivial.en: Don't worry about such trivial matters.

trophy.en: She lifted the trophy above her head.

tumor.en: The doctor removed a small tumor.
tumor.zh: 醫生切除了一個小腫瘤。

tuna.en: She made a tuna sandwich for lunch.
tuna.zh: 她午餐做了一個鮪魚三明治。

ultimate.en: Their ultimate goal is to win the cup.
ultimate.zh: 他們的終極目標是贏得獎盃。

undergo.en: He will undergo surgery next week.

undergraduate.en: She is an undergraduate studying art.
undergraduate.zh: 她是個主修藝術的大學生。

undermine.zh: 不斷的批評會削弱自信。

undertake.zh: 她接下了一個困難的專案。

undo.en: Press this button to undo the change.

undoubtedly.en: She is undoubtedly the best singer.

unemployment.zh: 經濟衰退期間失業率上升。

unfold.en: She unfolded the map on the table.

unlock.en: Use this key to unlock the door.

unprecedented.en: The heat this summer was unprecedented.
unprecedented.zh: 今年夏天的高溫是前所未有的。

update.en: She updated the software on her phone.
update.zh: 她更新了手機上的軟體。

upgrade.en: He upgraded to a faster computer.
upgrade.zh: 他升級到一台更快的電腦。

utility.en: We pay our utility bills each month.

utilize.en: We should utilize our time well.

vacuum.en: She used a vacuum to clean the carpet.

vague.en: His directions were too vague to follow.
vague.zh: 他的指示太模糊，無法照著做。

valid.en: Your ticket is valid for one day.

variable.en: The weather here is very variable.

variation.en: There is some variation in the colors.

vein.en: Blood flows back to the heart through veins.
vein.zh: 血液透過靜脈流回心臟。

vendor.en: A street vendor sold us hot snacks.
vendor.zh: 一個街頭小販賣給我們熱點心。

venture.en: Starting a business is a risky venture.

venue.en: The hall is the venue for the concert.
venue.zh: 這個大廳是演唱會的場地。

version.en: This is the latest version of the app.
version.zh: 這是這個應用程式的最新版本。

versus.en: Tonight's game is our team versus theirs.
versus.zh: 今晚的比賽是我們隊對他們隊。

vertical.en: Draw a vertical line down the page.
vertical.zh: 在頁面上畫一條垂直線。

veteran.en: He is a veteran teacher with thirty years' experience.
veteran.zh: 他是有三十年經驗的資深老師。

via.en: We flew to Paris via London.
via.zh: 我們經由倫敦飛往巴黎。

viable.en: Solar power is a viable energy source.
viable.zh: 太陽能是個可行的能源。

vicious.en: A vicious dog chased the mail carrier.
vicious.zh: 一隻兇惡的狗追著郵差跑。

viewer.en: The show has millions of viewers.
viewer.zh: 這個節目有數百萬觀眾。

viewpoint.zh: 她清楚地說明了她的觀點。

vinegar.en: She added vinegar to the salad.

virtual.en: We had a virtual meeting online.
virtual.zh: 我們在線上開了個虛擬會議。

visa.en: You need a visa to enter the country.
visa.zh: 進入這個國家需要簽證。

vocal.en: She takes vocal lessons to sing better.
vocal.zh: 她上聲樂課把歌唱得更好。

volcano.en: The volcano has been quiet for years.
volcano.zh: 這座火山已經沉寂多年。

vomit.en: He felt sick and began to vomit.

voucher.en: She used a voucher to get a discount.

vow.en: They made a vow to stay together.

vulnerable.en: Young animals are vulnerable to danger.
vulnerable.zh: 幼小的動物容易受到危險威脅。

warehouse.en: The goods are stored in a warehouse.

warrior.en: The brave warrior defended the village.
warrior.zh: 勇敢的戰士保衛了村莊。

wary.zh: 對網路上的陌生人要小心。

weird.en: I had a weird dream last night.

whatsoever.en: He had no reason whatsoever to lie.
whatsoever.zh: 他根本沒有任何理由說謊。

wheelchair.zh: 這個坡道方便輪椅使用者。

whereas.en: He likes tea, whereas she prefers coffee.
whereas.zh: 他喜歡茶，而她偏好咖啡。

whine.en: The child began to whine for candy.
whine.zh: 那個孩子開始哭鬧著要糖果。

widespread.zh: 這則消息引起了廣泛的擔憂。

wig.en: The actor wore a curly wig.
wig.zh: 演員戴著一頂捲髮假髮。

wilderness.en: They camped deep in the wilderness.

wildlife.zh: 這座公園保護當地的野生動物。

windshield.en: Rain ran down the car's windshield.
windshield.zh: 雨水從車子的擋風玻璃上流下。

wither.zh: 這些花沒有水就枯萎了。

witty.zh: 她給了一個機智的回答。

workshop.zh: 我們參加了一個寫作工作坊。

worthwhile.en: The trip was tiring but worthwhile.
worthwhile.zh: 這趟旅行雖累但很值得。

worthy.en: She is worthy of the prize.

yacht.en: They sailed a yacht around the bay.
yacht.zh: 他們駕著遊艇環繞海灣。
